layout.structure: Fixed left glassy sidebar (~260px) + Top sticky header + Main content area with responsive bento-style CSS grid.

components.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-[260px] bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-white/5 z-50 flex flex-col
components.header: sticky top-0 h-16 w-full bg-[#0A0A0B]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-8
components.main_wrapper: ml-[260px] min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0B] flex flex-col relative

tasks_scheduler.description: List of upcoming tasks with a drag-drop feel.
tasks_scheduler.visuals: List items with a left drag-handle icon. Columns for Task ID (mono font), Type, Priority (pill badges), and Status. Left-aligned text.
tasks_scheduler.interaction: Hover highlights the row with a very subtle blue gradient background (bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500/10 to-transparent).

live_activities.visuals: Card containing a list. Each item has a progress bar (bg-blue-600, h-2, rounded-full), Task Name, Assigned Robot ID, and percentage text.
live_activities.layout: Dense spacing (gap-4) to fit multiple active tasks.

threejs_map.visuals: Dark theme scene. Background: #0A0A0B. Floor: GridHelper (color: #222222). Robots: Box geometries with neon blue edges/emissive glow. Obstacles: Dark grey wireframes.
threejs_map.layout: col-span-full xl:col-span-8 row-span-2 min-h-[400px] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden relative border border-white/5
threejs_map.controls: OrbitControls enabled for panning/zooming. Overlay text indicating 'Live Fleet View'.

fleet_status.visuals: List of robots. Each row has Robot Name, Battery (progress bar with color based on level: green/amber/red), Status (pill badge: Active, Idle, Charging).

tasks_history.visuals: Simple table format. Headings are uppercase, small tracking-widest text. Rows have subtle bottom borders (border-white/5). No pagination for now, just a scrollable list.

notifications_alerts.visuals: List of alerts. Icons to indicate severity (red triangle for alert, blue info circle for info). Small 'Dismiss' pill buttons on hover.

charging_stations.visuals: Small grid of square/rectangular tiles representing stations. Glowing green dot for 'Available', pulsing blue for 'Charging', grey for 'Offline'.

iconography.rules: Use stroke-width 1.5. No emojis. Use precise icons: LayoutDashboard, ListTodo, Map, History, Bell, Settings, Battery, Zap, Bot, GripVertical (for drag handles).

image_urls.description: Dark blue grid with vertical lines for empty state backgrounds or map container underlay.
Blue and black abstract background to be used with high opacity mask for header or active card accents.
Expansive industrial warehouse interior, used with a heavy black/blue gradient overlay (bg-black/80) for the top hero section of the dashboard.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for layout wrappers to ensure precise glassy bento-grid matching the specifications.
Use Shadcn UI for interactive components (dropdowns, dialogs, progress bars, tables) but deeply customize the borders and backgrounds to match the #131418 card background and border-white/5 spec.
Do NOT include any generic charts/metrics (no Recharts). The user explicitly requested NO stats or metrics.
Implement the left sidebar exactly 260px wide, fixed, with a glassy blur. The main content must have ml-[260px] to prevent overlap.
Implement the top header with a breadcrumb 'Pages / Dashboard'.

Use @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei for the 3D map. Keep it simple: GridHelper for the floor, dark wireframe boxes for warehouse shelves, and glowing blue boxes/cylinders for robots. The robots should just be static meshes spread out over the grid.
Ensure all fonts (Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono) are imported from Google Fonts in the main index.html/css.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements to support automated testing.
